title: Phalangium minimum
taxonomy: Phalangium minimum is classified within the order Opiliones, commonly known as daddy long legs or harvestmen. This order consists of over 6,600 species of arachnids. Phalangium minimum belongs to the family Phalangiidae, which is one of the largest families within the order. The genus Phalangium includes approximately 15 species of harvestmen. These arachnids are found in various parts of the world, often inhabiting forests, grasslands, and other terrestrial ecosystems.
